#include "game.h"

Item* create_item(const char* name, const char* description, int value) {
    if (!name || !description || value < 0) {
        return NULL;
    }
    
    Item* item = (Item*)malloc(sizeof(Item));
    if (!item) {
        return NULL;
    }
    
    strncpy(item->name, name, MAX_NAME_LENGTH - 1);
    item->name[MAX_NAME_LENGTH - 1] = '\0';
    
    strncpy(item->description, description, MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH - 1);
    item->description[MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH - 1] = '\0';
    
    item->value = value;
    
    return item;
}

void add_item_to_room(Room* room, Item* item) {
    if (!room || !item || room->num_items >= MAX_ITEMS) {
        return;
    }
    
    room->items[room->num_items] = item;
    room->num_items++;
}

void add_item_to_inventory(Game* game, Item* item) {
    if (!game || !item || game->num_items >= MAX_ITEMS) {
        return;
    }
    
    game->inventory[game->num_items] = item;
    game->num_items++;
}

void remove_item_from_room(Room* room, Item* item) {
    if (!room || !item) {
        return;
    }
    
    for (int i = 0; i < room->num_items; i++) {
        if (room->items[i] == item) {
            for (int j = i; j < room->num_items - 1; j++) {
                room->items[j] = room->items[j + 1];
            }
            room->num_items--;
            room->items[room->num_items] = NULL;
            break;
        }
    }
}

void remove_item_from_inventory(Game* game, Item* item) {
    if (!game || !item) {
        return;
    }
    
    for (int i = 0; i < game->num_items; i++) {
        if (game->inventory[i] == item) {
            for (int j = i; j < game->num_items - 1; j++) {
                game->inventory[j] = game->inventory[j + 1];
            }
            game->num_items--;
            game->inventory[game->num_items] = NULL;
            break;
        }
    }
}

Room* create_room(const char* name, const char* description, int north, int east, int south, int west) {
    if (!name || !description) {
        return NULL;
    }
    
    Room* room = (Room*)malloc(sizeof(Room));
    if (!room) {
        return NULL;
    }
    
    strncpy(room->name, name, MAX_NAME_LENGTH - 1);
    room->name[MAX_NAME_LENGTH - 1] = '\0';
    
    strncpy(room->description, description, MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH - 1);
    room->description[MAX_DESCRIPTION_LENGTH - 1] = '\0';
    
    room->num_items = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < MAX_ITEMS; i++) {
        room->items[i] = NULL;
    }
    
    room->north = north;
    room->east = east;
    room->south = south;
    room->west = west;
    
    return room;
}

Game* create_game(const char* player_name) {
    if (!player_name) {
        return NULL;
    }
    
    Game* game = (Game*)malloc(sizeof(Game));
    if (!game) {
        return NULL;
    }
    
    strncpy(game->player_name, player_name, MAX_NAME_LENGTH - 1);
    game->player_name[MAX_NAME_LENGTH - 1] = '\0';
    
    game->num_items = 0;
    game->num_rooms = 0;
    game->current_room = 0;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < MAX_ITEMS; i++) {
        game->inventory[i] = NULL;
    }
    
    for (int i = 0; i < MAX_ROOMS; i++) {
        game->rooms[i] = NULL;
    }
    
    // Create rooms
    Room* entrance = create_room("Entrance", "You stand at the entrance of a dark dungeon. Torchlight flickers on the stone walls.", -1, 1, -1, -1);
    Room* hallway = create_room("Hallway", "A long, narrow hallway stretches before you. Cobwebs hang from the ceiling.", 2, -1, 0, -1);
    Room* throne = create_room("Throne Room", "A magnificent throne sits atop a raised platform. Ancient tapestries adorn the walls.", -1, -1, 1, -1);
    Room* treasure = create_room("Treasure Room", "Gold coins scatter the floor! The room glitters with untold riches.", -1, -1, -1, 2);
    
    if (!entrance || !hallway || !throne || !treasure) {
        if (entrance) free(entrance);
        if (hallway) free(hallway);
        if (throne) free(throne);
        if (treasure) free(treasure);
        free(game);
        return NULL;
    }
    
    game->rooms[0] = entrance;
    game->rooms[1] = hallway;
    game->rooms[2] = throne;
    game->rooms[3] = treasure;
    game->num_rooms = 4;
    
    // Create items
    Item* sword = create_item("Sword", "A gleaming steel sword with an ornate hilt.", 25);
    Item* shield = create_item("Shield", "A sturdy wooden shield reinforced with iron.", 15);
    Item* potion = create_item("Health Potion", "A red bubbling liquid that restores health.", 10);
    Item* key = create_item("Golden Key", "An ancient golden key with mysterious engravings.", 50);
    Item* crown = create_item("King's Crown", "A magnificent golden crown encrusted with jewels.", 100);
    
    if (!sword || !shield || !potion || !key || !crown) {
        if (sword) free(sword);
        if (shield) free(shield);
        if (potion) free(potion);
        if (key) free(key);
        if (crown) free(crown);
        free_game(game);
        return NULL;
    }
    
    // Place items in rooms
    add_item_to_room(entrance, sword);
    add_item_to_room(hallway, shield);
    add_item_to_room(hallway, potion);
    add_item_to_room(treasure, key);
    add_item_to_room(throne, crown);
    
    return game;
}

void free_game(Game* game) {
    if (!game) {
        return;
    }
    
    // Free inventory items
    for (int i = 0; i < game->num_items; i++) {
        if (game->inventory[i]) {
            free(game->inventory[i]);
            game->inventory[i] = NULL;
        }
    }
    
    // Free rooms and their items
    for (int i = 0; i < game->num_rooms; i++) {
        if (game->rooms[i]) {
            // Free items in room
            for (int j = 0; j < game->rooms[i]->num_items; j++) {
                if (game->rooms[i]->items[j]) {
                    free(game->rooms[i]->items[j]);
                    game->rooms[i]->items[j] = NULL;
                }
            }
            free(game->rooms[i]);
            game->rooms[i] = NULL;
        }
    }
    
    free(game);
}

void print_room(const Game* game) {
    if (!game || game->current_room < 0 || game->current_room >= game->num_rooms) {
        printf("Error: Invalid room.\n");
        return;
    }
    
    Room* room = game->rooms[game->current_room];
    
    printf("\n=== %s ===\n", room->name);
    printf("%s\n\n", room->description);
    
    if (room->num_items > 0) {
        printf("You see the following items:\n");
        for (int i = 0; i < room->num_items; i++) {
            printf("- %s\n", room->items[i]->name);
        }
        printf("\n");
    }
    
    printf("Exits:\n");
    if (room->north >= 0) printf("  North: %s\n", game->rooms[room->north]->name);
    if (room->east >= 0) printf("  East: %s\n", game->rooms[room->east]->name);
    if (room->south >= 0) printf("  South: %s\n", game->rooms[room->south]->name);
    if (room->west >= 0) printf("  West: %s\n", game->rooms[room->west]->name);
    printf("\n");
}

void print_inventory(const Game* game) {
    if (!game) {
        return;
    }
    
    printf("\n=== Inventory ===\n");
    
    if (game->num_items == 0) {
        printf("Your inventory is empty.\n");
    } else {
        int total_value = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < game->num_items; i++) {
            if (game->inventory[i]) {
                print_item(game->inventory[i]);
                total_value += game->inventory[i]->value;
            }
        }
        printf("\nTotal inventory value: %d gold\n", total_value);
    }
    printf("\n");
}

void print_item(const Item* item) {
    if (!item) {
        return;
    }
    
    printf("- %s\n", item->name);
    printf("  %s\n", item->description);
    printf("  Value: %d gold\n", item->value);
}
